statePension.title: State Pension When You Retire
statePension.description: Please note that this will only become payable on your State Retirement Age.

link.text: For further information on State Pension

definedBenefit.title: Defined Benefit Pension
definedBenefit.description: You get a defined benefit pension from a workplace scheme that promises you a certain amount of pension at retirement.

definedContributionIncome.title: Defined Contribution Pension Income
definedContributionIncome.description: You may have built up a fund within a workplace pension or through a personal pension.
